info.name: Azure DevOps Pipelines API
info.description:
REST API for managing pipelines and pipeline runs in Azure DevOps. Provides programmatic access to create, list, run, and monitor CI/CD pipelines defined as YAML files in source repositories. Supports triggering runs with custom variables, parameters, and stage selections.


Contact Support:
 Name: Microsoft Azure DevOps

query.description: (Required) Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.
Filter by a specific artifact name
Expand additional artifact details

variable.description: (Required) Numeric ID of the pipeline run

request.description: Returns a list of artifacts published by a specific pipeline run. Artifacts can include compiled binaries, test results, container images, or any other files published using the PublishBuildArtifacts or PublishPipelineArtifact task.

response.name: List of run artifacts returned successfully

variable.description: (Required) Numeric ID of the pipeline run

request.description: Returns detailed information about a specific pipeline run, including its state, result, template parameters, variables used, and timing. Poll this endpoint to monitor run progress.

response.name: Pipeline run returned successfully

request.description: Triggers a new run of a pipeline. You can override template parameters, variables, the repository branch, and specify which stages to skip or include. The run is queued and executed when an agent becomes available.

response.name: Pipeline run started successfully

request.description: Creates a new pipeline definition in the project. The pipeline references a YAML file in a source repository. After creation, the pipeline can be run manually or triggered by code changes.
